title: C56 · Caduceus as Pre-Formal Dual-Agent Symbol

story.text:
# 💡 C56 · Caduceus as Pre-Formal Dual-Agent Symbol
**concept** · shared · knowledge

The caduceus (two serpents winding around a central staff without touching) carries the dihedral neg ⊥ bnot generator pair in classical iconography pre-formally. Provisional (60%). v1.6.0: Hermaion ⚚ rooted-staff ⊥ Caducea ☤ winged-caduceus splits the dihedral generator pair into two canonical glyphs.

## Edges in

- [[Tome V Act 16: The Threshold]] *introduces* →
